items.title: OpenAI Acquires AI Personal Finance Startup Hiro
items.summary: OpenAI has acquired Hiro, an AI personal finance startup, signaling its expansion into consumer-facing applications and financial technology.

items.title: Microsoft Developing New OpenClaw-like AI Agent
items.summary: Microsoft is reportedly developing another AI agent similar to OpenClaw, indicating a continued push by major tech companies into autonomous AI systems.

items.title: Stanford Report Highlights Growing Disconnect Between AI Insiders and the Public
items.summary: A new Stanford report reveals an increasing gap in understanding and perception of AI between industry professionals and the general public, raising concerns about societal impact and regulation.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Enhances Audio AI for More Natural and Reliable Interactions
items.summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live update focuses on improving audio AI capabilities, making voice interactions more natural and reliable for users.

items.title: Cloudflare Agent Cloud Integrates OpenAI for Enterprise Agentic Workflows
items.summary: Enterprises are now leveraging OpenAI's capabilities to power agentic workflows within Cloudflare's Agent Cloud, streamlining complex operations and automation.

items.title: WildDet3D: Scaling Promptable 3D Detection in the Wild Achieves High Engagement
items.summary: A new research paper introduces WildDet3D, a method for scaling promptable 3D object detection in diverse real-world environments, garnering significant attention.

items.title: Agent Memory Experiments Reveal Binding as the Core Problem, Not Just Recall
items.summary: Extensive experiments on AI agent memory suggest that the primary challenge lies in 'binding' information to specific contexts and actions, rather than simple recall failures.

items.title: FORGE: Fine-grained Multimodal Evaluation for Manufacturing Scenarios
items.summary: FORGE presents a novel framework for fine-grained multimodal evaluation specifically designed for manufacturing scenarios, addressing a critical need in industrial AI applications.

items.title: RefineAnything: Multimodal Region-Specific Refinement for Perfect Local Details
items.summary: RefineAnything introduces a multimodal approach for region-specific refinement, enabling AI models to generate images with exceptionally perfect local details.

items.title: EXAONE 4.5 Technical Report Details Latest Advances in AI Model
items.summary: The technical report for EXAONE 4.5 provides an in-depth look at the latest advancements and capabilities of this significant AI model.

items.title: Matrix-Game 3.0: Real-Time Interactive World Model with Long-Horizon Memory
items.summary: Matrix-Game 3.0 introduces a real-time and streaming interactive world model featuring long-horizon memory, enhancing AI's ability to understand and simulate complex environments.

items.title: Build a Talking Robot with Gemini Live and Reachy Mini
items.summary: A new guide demonstrates how to construct a talking robot using Google's Gemini Live and the Reachy Mini platform, making advanced robotics more accessible.

items.title: Turn Your Laptop Into an AI Agent with Free OpenClaw + Telegram Setup
items.summary: A practical guide shows users how to transform their laptop into a functional AI agent using the free OpenClaw framework integrated with Telegram.

items.title: AI Context Window Overflow: Memory Pointer Fix Addresses LLM Limitations
items.summary: A technical solution has been proposed to fix AI context window overflow issues, improving the stability and performance of large language models.

items.title: ELT: Elastic Looped Transformers for Efficient Visual Generation
items.summary: ELT (Elastic Looped Transformers) introduces an efficient architecture for visual generation, optimizing performance through a novel looped transformer design.
